creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
It looks like the content of this wiki page[1] is rather stale.

Here are my suggestions/questions:
 - Can we remove those old attachments? They are not relevant anymore, right?
 - Can we remove the "Unfortunately, the port is still not production ready." note?

[1]: https://wiki.freebsd.org/FuseFilesystem
